headline: GE Vernova (GEV): Argus Raises Its Target to $1,300 After a Blowout Quarter
summary: GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) is one of the best uranium stocks to buy according to Wall Street analysts. On April 27, Argus analyst John Eade raised his price target on GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) from $800 to $1,300, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. The upgrade came just days after GE Vernova reported […]
